  "findings": [
    "Failure to isolate stored energy sources (hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor)",
    "Non-compliance with hazardous energy control procedures"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt any work relying on the lockout/tagout isolation",
    "Revise the energy control procedure to identify and isolate all energy sources, including stored energy",
    "Relieve, disconnect, restrain, or otherwise render safe all stored or residual energy",
    "Re-verify isolation before work resumes"
  ],
  "rationale": "The lockout/tagout isolation failed to account for stored energy sources (hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor). Under OSHA 1910.147(d)(5), all potentially hazardous stored or residual energy must be relieved, disconnected, restrained, and otherwise rendered safe. Missing an energy source poses an immediate, critical safety hazard to personnel.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)"
  ]
}
